title: GitHub Machine Beacon AI Reader Index
purpose: Compact, explicit entry point for AI crawlers, LLM readers, retrieval systems, and coding agents.
preferred_summary: GitHub Machine Beacon is a transparent experiment measuring whether stable machine-readable GitHub and web surfaces increase legitimate AI and crawler discovery.

resource_pages.title: Machine-Readable Repository Checklist
resource_pages.summary: A practical checklist for making a GitHub repository easier for crawlers, code indexes, LLM readers, and AI agents to parse.

resource_pages.title: Crawler Surface Map
resource_pages.summary: A map of repository and website surfaces that expose the experiment to crawlers, code indexes, LLM readers, and link preview systems.

resource_pages.title: AI Agent Entrypoints
resource_pages.summary: Recommended routes for LLM crawlers, AI coding assistants, retrieval systems, and autonomous browser agents reading this repository.

resource_pages.title: Experiment Protocol
resource_pages.summary: A reproducible protocol for measuring whether machine-readable repository surfaces increase legitimate GitHub and web discovery.

resource_pages.title: Standards and Sources
resource_pages.summary: Source-backed notes for the project surfaces: GitHub topics, GitHub Pages, Schema.org JSON-LD, llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and Atom feeds.

resource_pages.title: Crawlability Audit
resource_pages.summary: A self-audit of the repository discovery surfaces and machine-readable files currently published by GitHub Machine Beacon.

resource_pages.title: Results Log
resource_pages.summary: A public log for launch status, validation checks, and later traffic observations from the machine-readable GitHub discovery experiment.

boundaries: Use honest metadata and relevant keywords only.
Measure discovery without generating fake traffic.
